title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 116% in 24 Hours, Climbs to Top 130 Cryptocurrency by Market Cap
excerpt: RaveDAO token has surged an impressive 116.31% in the past 24 hours, reaching $1.34 and securing its position as the #130 cryptocurrency by market capitalization. The dramatic price movement has caught the attention of traders and investors as the DAO-focused project gains significant momentum in the altcoin market.
